analystIdentifiedAdditionalDependency.reason: Cross-frontend parity (P5) requires the WhatsApp interactive-message transport. Promoted into specDependsOn during the design phase per orchestrator decision (2026-07-24): WhatsApp is in scope for P5 and is modeled as a new bounded `whatsapp` Channel value via the documented types.go bounded-cardinality extension path, routed as a coordination note to the spec-078/spec-072 owners (design.md ## Resolved Design Contracts OQ2, ## Dependency And Ownership Map).
surfacedIn: spec.md ## Open Questions For UX, Design, And Planning #1

planningProvenance.claims: Planning phase only. This phase authored scopes/ (9 per-scope-directory scopes + _index.md), scenario-manifest.json (20 SCN-107 scenarios, all tests PLANNED / 0 linked), test-plan.json, report.md, uservalidation.md, and this state.json (planningProvenance, scopeDag, scopeLayout, artifacts, execution, executionHistory). No source, authored test, test pass, migration, browser run, certification, commit, push, or deployment work was performed or is claimed; certification.* was not touched. Dependency specs are entry gates, not delegated work.

snooze_window.decision: reuse suppression_window_hours (no distinct snooze_window_hours for MVP)

RAIL_MAX.constraint: integer 1..N; rail never renders the full edge store (NFR-107-003)

what_changed_page_cap.constraint: integer 1..N per column per page; cursor-paged created_at DESC

planningProvenance.migrationReservation: none expected -- the NudgeRef registry is in-memory; no new PostgreSQL business table is added; a migration number is allocated at pickup only if implementation proves one is needed

channelExtensionDecision.extensionPathPrecedent: ProducerNotification additive enum extension in internal/intelligence/surfacing/types.go
channelExtensionDecision.designRef: design.md ## Resolved Design Contracts OQ2 + ## Routed Questions

surfacingRouting.nudgeAckPath: single Acknowledge(content_key) on the process-wide AckLookup for act/snooze/dismiss on every channel

corpusOwnershipModel.identityModel: multiple authenticated identities with explicit roles/grants

scopeDag.pickupRule: All dependsOn scopes must be Done; pick the lowest-numbered eligible scope. Each external entry gate must be usable before its scope is picked up; entry gates are dependency specs, not delegated work.

completedPhaseClaims.summary: Authored grounded business requirements for a proactive, correlated, cross-frontend experience layer over the existing surfacing controller, edge store, capture-as-fallback policy, and assistant transports. Covers P1 Today cockpit, P2 actionable nudge cards, P3 correlation rail, P4 command palette, P5 cross-frontend parity, and P6 what-changed feed across web, Telegram, and WhatsApp, with observe-first, honest-state, single-controller, and compose-over-105/106 constraints.

Authored the UX/interaction-design layer inline in spec.md as '## UI Wireframes' and '## User Flows'. P1 Today cockpit (desktop/tablet/390px/320px+200% zoom) designed as the body of the spec-106 Today root destination. P2 proactive nudge card across web, Telegram (new a:n: act/snooze/dismiss callback family recommended within the real 64-byte callback_data bound, distinct from a:c:/a:d:), and WhatsApp (spec-072 interactive; 3 reply buttons + list/text fallback), with all honest states (permitted/escalated/acted/snoozed/suppressed/budget-exhausted/quiet/deduped/degraded/error). P3 always-on correlation rail (desktop side rail, mobile sheet, nonvisual outline) deep-linking into the spec-105 explorer via its existing Explore-connections seed contract; bounded projection, never re-implements the explorer. P4 Cmd/Ctrl-K ask-or-capture palette (answer / capture-as-idea via spec-074 / honest refusal; never saved-as-idea for a failed ask). P5 cross-frontend parity model with every card originating from the single spec-078 controller (no parallel surfacing path) and act-once-suppressed-everywhere. P6 two-column what-changed feed (desktop/mobile). Composed over spec-106 shell/tokens/typography/stable data-* DOM contract and the four availability labels; mapped proactive honest states onto 106 vocabulary and flagged the new bounded tokens as coordination items. No files under specs/105 or specs/106 were modified. Planning-only: no source, no executed tests, no deployment, status left not_started.

Authored design.md as the full technical composition over the single spec-078 surfacing controller, the spec-106 shell, and the spec-105 explorer, in the 105/106 house style (Design Brief -> Purpose And Change Boundary -> Grounded Architecture Findings -> Architecture Overview mermaid -> Capability Foundation -> Concrete Implementations -> Resolved Design Contracts -> Dependency And Ownership Map -> Data Model -> Security -> Observability -> Complexity Tracking -> Routed Questions). Resolved every routed OQ as a typed contract: OQ2 nudge callback = additive Telegram a:n:<ref>:<a|s|d> subprefix (~32 bytes, inside the 64-byte callback_data bound, new callbackKindNudge, never colliding with a:c:/a:d:/spec-028) + WhatsApp reply-id carrying the same shape, both resolved through a shared ephemeral process-local NudgeRef registry so no content_key ever reaches a wire; OQ4 WhatChangedRead = bounded, cursor-paged, authorized read over agent_traces + surfacing verdicts + topic lifecycle (left) and a recency read (right), honest populated/quiet/partial/unavailable/unauthorized, restart-safe with NO unread watermark and NO second store; OQ5 CorrelationRailRead = a RAIL_MAX-bounded call of the spec-105 GraphQueryService.Neighborhood(seed,depth=1) under the same GraphReaderAuthorizer, returning GraphNodeV1 rows + GraphReasonResolver reasons + the stable <kind>:<id> seed for the exact /knowledge/graph?...&seed=&focus= deep-link, honest no-related (105 isolated-only) vs unavailable, no parallel graph path, no client cache; OQ6 snooze = Acknowledge(content_key) on the existing SuppressionWindow (act/snooze/dismiss all ack; snooze differs by intent/label/window; MVP reuses suppression_window_hours; no snooze store); OQ7 identity join = suppression already global by content_key on one process-wide controller, join = (transport,transport_user)->auth.Session principal reusing each transport's existing auth mapping, no identity store. Also specified the web action transport (spec-106 authenticated same-origin mutation carrying only {nudgeRef,action}; no bearer in JS, no new bypass, no new surfacing path) and the command-palette routing contract (Facade OutcomeOK+grounded -> answer; CaptureRoute -> spec-074 Idea + StatusSavedAsIdea; failed/refused -> StatusUnavailable/honest refusal, NEVER saved-as-idea; honors the OutcomeOK-only capture gate in facade.go). Grounded Architecture Findings table cites real files (controller.go, types.go, suppression.go, budget.go, metrics/surfacing.go, telegram/assistant_adapter/callbacks.go, graphapi, agent/store.go, 020_agent_traces.sql, topics/lifecycle.go, assistant/facade.go, capturefallback/payload.go, api/router.go, api/pwa.go). Every card routes through the one controller.Propose verdict; no parallel surfacing path, no second budget/dedupe/suppression, no new business store, no client cache of sensitive data. whatsapp reserved as an additive bounded Channel value routed to the spec-078 enum owner (types.go NOT edited). No files under specs/105, specs/106, specs/072, or specs/078 were modified. Planning-only: no source, no executed product tests, no migrations claimed (reserved at pickup), no browser runs, no deployment; status left not_started; certification.* untouched. Next owner: bubbles.plan.

executionHistory.summary: Created analyst-owned spec.md and state.json only for the new feature 107 Proactive & Correlated Experience. Grounded every requirement in real in-tree assets (surfacing controller, capture-as-fallback, assistant transports, edge store) and cited docs/Product-Principles.md and docs/smackerel.md §12/§17.1. Recorded compose-over-105/106 non-mutation boundaries and single-controller routing as machine-readable state. No UX, design, scopes, scope DAG, scenario manifest, test plan, report, user validation, source, tests, certification, commit, push, or deployment work was performed. Next owner: bubbles.ux.

Authored the UX/interaction-design layer inline in spec.md (## UI Wireframes + ## User Flows) for P1–P6 across web PWA, Telegram, and WhatsApp. Composed over the spec-106 shell, theme tokens, typography, stable data-* DOM contract, and four availability labels; designed the P1 cockpit as the spec-106 Today body (landing-route coordination recorded); mapped proactive honest states onto the 106 vocabulary. Deep-linked the P3 correlation rail into the spec-105 explorer via its existing Explore-connections seed contract without re-implementing it. Every proactive card routes through the single spec-078 surfacing controller with act-once-suppressed-everywhere, identical budget-defer, and identical urgent-escalation across channels. Recommended the Telegram a:n: nudge callback family within the real 64-byte bound and the WhatsApp interactive 3-button + fallback rendering, leaving exact wire encoding and the whatsapp channel-enum decision to bubbles.design. Did NOT modify specs/105 or specs/106 (dependencies only). Ran the UX mode mechanical gate (UX1 present, UX8 no sidecar). Planning-only: no code, no executed product tests, no deployment; status left not_started (orchestration ceiling specs_hardened). Next owner: bubbles.design.

Authored design.md in the 105/106 house style: the full technical composition of the proactive/correlated experience over the single spec-078 surfacing controller, the spec-106 shell, and the spec-105 explorer. Defined the ProactiveExperience capability foundation (ProactiveCardModel, NudgeRef registry, NudgeAck path, CorrelationRailRead, WhatChangedRead, PaletteTurnRouter, HonestStatePresenter, BudgetMeterRead), the three channel renderings, and the single-controller routing rule. Resolved OQ2 (a:n: Telegram callback family + WhatsApp reply-id via a shared opaque NudgeRef registry, no content_key on any wire), OQ4 (bounded authorized WhatChangedRead over agent_traces + surfacing verdicts + topic lifecycle + recency; no second store, no unread counter), OQ5 (CorrelationRailRead as a RAIL_MAX-bounded spec-105 neighborhood call with the exact seed deep-link; no parallel graph path, no client cache), OQ6 (snooze = Acknowledge(content_key); no snooze store), OQ7 (cross-channel suppression already global by content_key; join reuses each transport's existing auth mapping), plus the web action transport and command-palette routing contract. Promoted specs/072-whatsapp-business-transport into specDependsOn per orchestrator decision and reserved whatsapp as an additive bounded Channel value routed as a coordination note to the spec-078 enum owner (types.go NOT edited). Did NOT modify specs/105, specs/106, specs/072, or specs/078 (dependencies only). Planning-only: no code, no executed product tests, no migrations claimed, no browser runs, no deployment; status left not_started (orchestration ceiling specs_hardened); certification.* untouched. Next owner: bubbles.plan.

Authored the scope plan + planning artifacts (final product-to-planning phase, ceiling specs_hardened). Decomposed P1-P6 across web PWA + Telegram + WhatsApp into 9 sequential, dependency-ordered, per-scope-directory scopes (scopes/NN-name/scope.md + _index.md) in the spec-105/106 house style. Mapped all 20 SCN-107 scenarios one-to-one to owning scopes; every scenario has concrete unit/integration/e2e-api/e2e-ui planning (80 scenario rows) plus supplemental canary/stress/anti-leak/non-collision/restart/contrast/telemetry/acceptance rows (107 total). Authored scenario-manifest.json (20 scenarios, all tests PLANNED / 0 linked) and test-plan.json. Recorded the four SST no-default decisions (nudge_ref_ttl_hours=6, RAIL_MAX=6, what_changed_page_cap=25, snooze reuses suppression_window_hours) reserved for implementation (config/smackerel.yaml NOT edited). Every card originates from the single spec-078 controller; the rail is a tighter-bounded spec-105 neighborhood call; the palette consumes spec-074/061; no second store, budget, client cache, or owner edit. Did NOT modify specs/105, specs/106, specs/072, or specs/078. Ran artifact-lint.sh (exit 0) and traceability-guard.sh (exit 0, 0 warnings, 20/20 DoD fidelity). Planning-only: no source, authored-test, test-pass, migration, browser, deployment, commit, or push; certification.* untouched; status left not_started (planning-complete convention). Next owner: bubbles.implement.

All 20 SCN-107 scenarios mapped one-to-one to owning scopes; every scenario has concrete unit/integration/e2e-api/e2e-ui planning (80 scenario rows) plus supplemental canary/stress/anti-leak/non-collision/restart/contrast/telemetry/acceptance rows (107 total). scenario-manifest.json covers 20 scenarios with ALL tests PLANNED / not-yet-authored (0 linked); test-plan.json is the executable handoff. Four SST no-default decisions recorded (reserved, config/smackerel.yaml NOT edited): nudge_ref_ttl_hours=6 (>= max(suppression_window_hours=4, dedupe_window_hours=6)); RAIL_MAX=6; what_changed_page_cap=25; snooze reuses suppression_window_hours (no distinct snooze_window_hours for MVP). No migration reserved (NudgeRef registry is in-memory; number allocated at pickup only if needed). Every card originates from the single spec-078 controller; the rail is a tighter-bounded spec-105 neighborhood call; the palette consumes spec-074/061/073; no second store, second budget, client cache, or owner edit; whatsapp Channel value remains a coordination note to spec-078. Did NOT modify specs/105, specs/106, specs/072, or specs/078 (dependencies/entry gates only). artifact-lint.sh exit 0 and traceability-guard.sh exit 0 (0 warnings, 20 scenarios, 20/20 DoD fidelity, 107 test rows) captured this session. Planning-only: no source, authored-test, test-pass, migration, browser, deployment, commit, or push; certification.* untouched; status left not_started (planning-complete convention, matching 105/106).
